Settings

Setup stays hidden here so the audience sees the clean arena view.

Use ranges, lists, or both. Examples: 1 - 100, 1, 3, 5, 7, or 10-20, 42, 99.

Muted colors, no sparks, quieter wording, and a softer elimination sound.

Uses browser-generated tones. No audio files are needed.

55%
The current list, eliminated players, mode, sound preference, and volume are saved in this browser with localStorage.
